findings.summary: Peloton Bike Plus (approximately 140 pounds) in upstairs bedroom not recorded in inventory.
findings.quote: So first, my wife and I just realized we have this Peloton in the upstairs bedroom that we forgot to tell you about. It's the bigger one, the Bike Plus, I think it weighs around 140 pounds.

findings.summary: Service entrance off the alley at destination building, not the front entrance shown on Google Maps.
findings.quote: The destination address, the one in Santa Monica, the building entrance is actually around the back, not the front like Google Maps shows. There's a service entrance off the alley.

findings.summary: Freight elevator must be reserved and used between 10 am and 2 pm; regular elevator cannot be used.
findings.quote: Second, the freight elevator has to be reserved between 10 am and 2 pm. They won't let movers use the regular elevator at all.

findings.summary: Certificate of Insurance required to be sent to manager@elmtowers.example.com at least 48 hours before move-in day.
findings.quote: First, they need a Certificate of Insurance, a COI, before move-in day. They were really firm about that. They want it sent to manager@elmtowers.example.com at least 48 hours before.

findings.summary: Mother-in-law will be at destination and primarily speaks Russian; crew should be aware of potential language barrier.
findings.quote: Oh and I forgot, my mother-in-law is going to be at the destination to let the crew in. She doesn't speak much English. She speaks Russian mainly.

findings.summary: 75-gallon saltwater fish tank (empty glass tank) requires careful wrapping and must be fully dry before arrival.
findings.quote: We have a saltwater fish tank, it's a 75 gallon tank. We're going to drain it ourselves but the tank itself, the empty glass tank, do you guys move that? It's pretty big and heavy even when empty.

findings.summary: Credit card payment method with 3% processing fee to be added on move day.
findings.quote: Credit card payment is fine, there's a small processing fee of three percent that gets added on the day of.
